examples: She gingerly secured the loose paint flakes around the rip with a liquid adhesive.
Thus, for any cut that the adhesive can hold closed as well as stitches can, it is more economical to use the adhesive.
Whereas stitches must generally be removed by medical personnel after the cut has healed, the adhesive simply wears off.
You'll need to buy tiny tweezers, a magnifying makeup mirror and special eyelash adhesive.
Sure, in new editions, Margaret's sanitary napkin and belt have been replaced with adhesive pads.
